name: Oracle And Dell Take Aim At Midsize Businesses
description: InformationWeek/Network Computing article on the Oracle-Dell SMB pre-installation deal: Oracle granted Dell the exclusive right (through 2004 year-end) to deliver preinstalled Oracle Standard Edition One on Dell PowerEdge 2600/2650 servers running Red Hat Linux or Windows, starting at $4,108 for 5/10/25/unlimited user licenses. Aberdeen Group analyst Peter Kastner argues the pre-install model is particularly useful to SMBs, and the nine-month head start could translate into 1 million shipments for Dell — 'Dell will be able to take the exclusivity period to the bank.'
